beta.notice: This site is primarily designed for Japanese workplaces. English translation is in beta — some sections may still appear in Japanese.
home.hero.title: Quick access to workplace safety information
home.hero.description: Review law updates, field risks, accident DB, and KY forms in one place
pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.description: Start free at ¥0, then step up to ¥980 / ¥2,980 monthly plans, Business ¥29,800 (up to 100 users), or Custom. No minimum commitment — cancel anytime.
pricing.plan.free.name: Free
pricing.plan.free.target: Individuals and sole proprietors who want to try it out
pricing.plan.standard.name: Standard
pricing.plan.standard.target: Site supervisors and single safety managers
pricing.plan.pro.name: Pro
pricing.plan.business.name: Business
pricing.plan.custom.name: Custom
pricing.consult.title: Not sure? Start with a free 30-min consultation.
pricing.consult.description: We'll discuss your current challenges and recommend the best plan or one-off contract. Online or in-person. No hard sales.
pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.note: * Monthly plan prices are tax-inclusive. Custom work is quoted tax-exclusive (10% consumption tax applied separately).
services.title: Professional Services
services.description: Consulting and development services supervised by a registered Occupational Safety Consultant.
services.consult.title: Free 30-min consultation available
services.consult.description: Subsidy applications (up to ¥1.5M) handled together. Contact us for an estimate.
services.subsidy.label: Subsidy eligible
education.title: Safety & Health Education
education.description: Special education, statutory training, and occupational health education — 12 programs available
education.category.roudoueisei: Occupational Health Education (労働衛生教育)
education.contact.description: We handle everything from needs assessment to completion certificate issuance. Online and on-site options available.
education.youtsu.title: Low Back Pain Prevention Training
education.youtsu.description: 2-hour occupational health education based on MHLW Low Back Pain Prevention Guidelines (職場における腰痛予防対策指針)
chemical_ra.title: Chemical Substance Risk Assessment
chemical_ra.description: RA tool based on the 2024 Occupational Safety and Health Act chemical management reforms (安衛法令和4年改正対応)
accidents.title: Accident Database
accidents.description: Search and browse workplace accident cases. Links to MHLW database included.
chatbot.title: Occupational Safety Law AI Chat
chatbot.description: AI answers your questions based on occupational safety and health laws
chatbot.warning: AI responses are for reference only. Always verify with primary sources or a qualified expert before making legal or safety decisions.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Feature requests, bug reports, implementation inquiries — we'd love to hear from you.
about.title: About ANZEN AI
about.description: Operator information and legal disclosures for ANZEN AI
about.one_big_thing: A workplace safety portal that continuously evolves through open PDCA
about.contact.title: Questions or Feedback
